text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Did you celebrate with any traditional cuisine? I
tried making a full box of osechi dishes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I have plenty to share, if you'd like me to bring
you any.
choice_data_list:
It must've taken a lot of work to make
everything yourself.

It must've taken a lot of work to make
everything yourself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It was a challenge, yes. But I wanted to immerse
myself entirely in the local New Year's customs.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Besides, this will be a year of challenges. An early
start will only help me in the long run.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I will be facing my venerated seniors. Every type
of preparation is invaluable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So yes—on that note...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The year's tone is set on day one, as they say.
Why don't we talk about our aspirations for the
upcoming year?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What would you like to accomplish this year,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Racing knowledge... I see.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Races like the Classics demand more than just
brute strength alone.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Please enlighten me with your tactical insight.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Would you be willing to start right away?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder looks so motivated that I end up
spending the whole of New Year's Day poring
over race films with her—and snacking our way
through her handmade dishes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A wise choice—I wouldn't want to miss any races
due to poor conditioning.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I will do my best to attend to my own
health as well... but Trainer, how about yours?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I hope you aren't using New Year's as an excuse
to stay up late and overeat, are you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of the day in a deep discussion
over healthy lifestyle practices.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm... My skills, you say?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I've been wanting to
work on shortening my stride.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a little more practice, Grass Wonder's stride
could become the best weapon in her arsenal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While small fast steps aren't sustainable in longer
races, they would give quick acceleration for a
last spurt.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"Master oneself." I will fight back my instincts and
develop a controlled path to victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's competitive spirit is in full force,
so we decide to get a jump start on training.
